title: salix eleagnos subsp. angustifolia
intro: Salix eleagnos subsp. angustifolia, also known as the Willow Willow, is a subspecies of the Salix eleagnos plant, belonging to the willow family (Salicaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Salix eleagnos subsp. angustifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use, and can also be found in herbal supplements and topical creams.
